about.label: About
about.title: Empathy at the service of logic
about.text1: As a former nurse turned web developer, I chose this path because everything that motivated me in my previous career is here too: rigor, attention to detail, and problem-solving. I enjoy the logic of code just as much as crafting a polished interface. Trained on the MERN stack, I have worked across every layer — integration, React frontend, secure REST API, SEO, performance and accessibility — and I used the creation of this portfolio as an opportunity to learn TypeScript, adding an extra layer of reliability to my code. What all these experiences have in common: each time, I learned fast, on my own, and until I truly mastered it. I am methodical and rigorous, I structure before I act, and I deliver work I am proud of. Based in Yverdon-les-Bains, I am looking for my first web development position, in a team where continuous learning is valued.

skills.label: Skills
skills.text1: Clean and efficient code using modern frameworks and best practices
skills.text2: User-centered design, balancing aesthetics and functionality across all screen sizes
skills.text3: Continuous learning of new technologies and agility in the face of change
skills.text4: Optimized solutions for speed, accessibility and SEO
skills.text5: Clear communication and smooth teamwork throughout projects
skills.text6: Pixel-perfect approach with constant attention to code quality and data security
